title: Add Beads compatibility mode flag
description: Introduce CLI --beads mode to read Beads JSONL directly (live, no conversion), disable recursive project discovery in this mode to avoid duplicates, and reuse existing JSONL parsing logic. Intended for transitional use.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Resuming: implement Beads --beads mode in Rust CLI (list/ready/show), add shared Gherkin feature for beads mode, then run full specs and report coverage. Keeping read-only behavior and no commits.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Implemented Beads --beads compatibility mode for Rust CLI list/ready/show, added shared compatibility feature scenarios, and added compatibility step definitions for Python/Rust. Updated Beads mode scenarios to use global flag ordering (tsk --beads ...), added error coverage for missing .beads/issues.jsonl, local filtering rejection, and missing issue. Specs run: python3 tools/run_specs.py --format text (Python 100%, Rust 100%).

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: CLI supports --beads mode with JSONL read path; discovery avoids recursive Taskulus project scan; specs updated with parity.
